sqlMap.select: /*DialogDgrcompoDbiz.selectDgrcompo*/ SELECT A.DBIZ_CD , B.DBIZ_NM FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A LEFT JOIN TB_DGRBIZ B ON A.FIS_YEAR = B.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = B.BGT_DGR AND A.DBIZ_CD = B.DBIZ_CD WHERE A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.DEPT_CD = #deptCd# GROUP BY A.DBIZ_CD
